/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/be_qt.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/be_qt.dir/be_qt_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/be_qt.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/be_qt.dir/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/be_qt.dir/dataManager.cpp.o -o be_qt  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.8.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.2
